title: Escape Rope
description: A useful rope that takes you to the last place you could see the sky. Useful for going back to the entrance of a cave or large structure. This mod is intended to be used alongside Cobblemon, but can be used on its own too.
body:
This is a very simple mod that aims to return you to the entrance of a cave or structure by using an Escape Rope! I made this to use in my Cobblemon server but it is completely stand alone and can work in any pack. 

![The Escape Rope Item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e8f79ff6bdf64c787c8f154bf72299515c8f838.png)

How it works:
The mod keeps up with player coordinates and records the last coordinates at which your player could see the sky. Using the rope moves you to those coordinates. Simple. 

Recipe:
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2f745e78a592f7c83cd7b7fc68c7e9194308172.png)
